description_long: This is a lifelike representation of a deer, featuring a slender, elongated body covered in a reddish-brown coat with subtle shading. The deer has a prominent set of branched antlers extending upward from its head, and its face is narrow with a pointed snout and large, alert ears. Its legs are long and thin, ending in small, visible hooves, and the tail is short and slightly raised. The musculature and contours of the body are well-defined, especially around the shoulders and haunches, giving it a realistic, natural stance. The surface texture appears matte and slightly rough, mimicking the look of fur. This deer would be well-suited for placement in urban parks, green spaces, or naturalistic street scenes.
description: A realistic, reddish-brown deer with prominent antlers, slender legs, and a short tail, standing in a natural pose. The surface is matte and textured to resemble fur.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical antlers, pointed snout, and upright ears.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the body, the curvature of the back, and the antlers' profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the short tail, hindquarters, and the back of the antlers.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible antlers, legs, and the short tail.
